meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Level Up Apps
content.seo_description: Break through your development plateau. Learn Claude Code skills setup to ship complex, production-ready apps using Antigravity and AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are coding in isolation. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a senior engineering partner. This setup automates boilerplate, refactors legacy logic, and forces you to think in architectural patterns, allowing you to build production-grade applications instead of basic tutorials.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and you feel the familiar sting of the 'tutorial trap.' You’ve built the To-Do lists and the basic weather apps, but the jump to a high-impact, scalable SaaS feels like climbing a mountain in flip-flops. Your code works, but it feels fragile—a house of cards waiting for the first gust of real-world traffic.

It is time to stop typing and start architecting. By mastering the Claude Code and Antigravity workflow, you aren't just writing lines; you are orchestrating an AI-powered development environment that acts as an extension of your own intent. This is the bridge between a student's prototype and an engineer's product.

steps.title: Environment Synchronization
steps.description: Establish a secure bridge between your local repository and the Claude environment to ensure context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold with TypeScript, ESLint, and a clear folder structure for a modular SaaS application.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define your data models before writing a single line of functional code to prevent technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and generate a comprehensive Prisma schema and API route structure for a multi-tenant authentication system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate the Prisma schema for user roles and subscription tiers.'

steps.title: Automated Test-Driven Development
steps.description: Use AI to write the test suite before the implementation to ensure your logic remains rock-solid.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit tests for the authentication controller, covering edge cases like token expiration and invalid user sessions.

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks in your initial code and use AI to refactor them into clean, reusable components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code smells in my current component structure and suggest a more modular approach using React hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Refactor the navigation component for better state management.'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure your deployment scripts to ensure your app is ready for real-world traffic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions CI/CD configuration to automate deployment to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your project's specific style guide, ensuring consistent code across files.
Never let the AI write an entire feature in one go; break tasks into micro-functions to maintain control over the logic.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments for every function to make your code portfolio look professional to recruiters.
If the AI enters a loop, use the 'claude reset' command to clear the context buffer and regain architectural focus.
Always review the diffs generated by Claude Code; treat them as pull requests from a junior dev you are mentoring.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, commit your current state to GitHub and attempt to add one complex feature—like Stripe payments or real-time WebSockets—using your new AI-assisted workflow.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace 99% of other students. Stop building toys and start building the future of the web. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
